summary: Hot, high‑energy SPAC show captured in an excellent recording source
review: Both reviewers rave about the vivid energy of the performance at SPAC, likening it to an earthquake and saying the recording brings that feeling straight back. The audio is described as “smoking hot” and a go‑to source, suggesting crystal‑clear, vibrant sound even though the exact source type isn’t specified.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistently high ratings (5 and 4 stars) highlight an electrifying show and a superb‑sounding recording, leading to a strong overall score despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the audio “smoking hot” and refer to it as the go‑to source, indicating very clear and vibrant sound though no specific source (soundboard/audience) is identified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energy described as earthquake‑like, suggesting a powerful, high‑energy performance that sustains momentum throughout the set.
